description: Production incident: Multiple partners began receiving HTTP 429 rate limit responses from the fictional Reporting API at 11:17 UTC. Internal monitoring shows request volume is within the usual weekday range, but rate limit rejections are above baseline. A configuration rollout at 10:55 UTC changed partner quota grouping rules. One partner reports that separate applications under the same account appear to share one limit. Customer support is asking for a partner-facing update.
confirmed_facts: Multiple partners began receiving HTTP 429 rate limit responses from the fictional Reporting API at 11:17 UTC.
Internal monitoring shows request volume is within the usual weekday range.
Rate limit rejections are above baseline.
A configuration rollout at 10:55 UTC changed partner quota grouping rules.
One partner reports that separate applications under the same account appear to share one limit.
Customer support is asking for a partner-facing update.
unknowns: The exact root cause is unknown.
The complete list of affected partners is unknown.
Whether the 10:55 UTC configuration rollout caused the HTTP 429 responses is unknown.
The exact quota grouping behavior experienced by each affected partner is unknown.
